headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -114.5)
key_insights: Fears trending up 61% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 176 quotes and 141 at strong intensity, driving a high score of 82.6 — people are venting forcefully today.
• The frustration score sits in the upper half of its 189-day range (max 171.9), making this a notably active day even as it eases back from yesterday's 124.5.
• Fears have improved from yesterday's -28.2 to -11.2, while Optimism remains persistently low and close to the bottom of its historical range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
